EXPLANATION: The Hugging Face model page at the cited URL (https://huggingface.co/nvidia/Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct-FP8) exists and is maintained under the `nvidia` organization, confirming NVIDIA as the publisher. The automated checker's "author mismatch" (flagging "Hugging Face" as the actual author) is a metadata artifact of the Hugging Face platform listing the hosting provider rather than the model publisher. This is a real, non-paper source (an official model repository) and the cited title, author (NVIDIA), and URL all match the actual page.
LINK: https://huggingface.co/nvidia/Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct-FP8
